name: taejae
description: TAEJAE University design system — Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: taejae-design-system
plugins.description: Build UI, pages, components, or mockups in the TAEJAE (태재대학교 AI미래전략대학원) brand design system — white-dominant canvas, TJ Purple accent, TJ Mint interaction, sharp geometry, Pretendard. Outputs Next.js + Tailwind v4 code or standalone HTML/CSS.
